title: .NET 11 Process API 全面升级
summary_angle: .NET 11 彻底改造 Process API：一行代码捕获进程输出、告别管道死锁、苹果 Silicon 性能提升 98 倍
narrative_flow: 旧 API 死锁困境 → 新 API 一行搞定 → 苹果 Silicon 98x 更快

information_blocks.label: 旧方法死锁
information_blocks.detail: 顺序读取两个流，管道缓冲区满则卡死
information_blocks.source: Sequential reads block on pipe buffer

information_blocks.label: 98x 更快
information_blocks.detail: Apple Silicon 进程启动速度提升 98 倍 (posix_spawn)

information_blocks.label: NativeAOT -32%
information_blocks.detail: 使用 SafeProcessHandle，NativeAOT 体积缩小 32%

comic_style_reason: release 类型文章默认选择 japanese-manga，分镜化叙事适合展示新 API 解决旧问题的转折
main_subject: 一名开发者面对进程输出管道死锁问题，.NET 11 的新 API 如魔法般一行解决，背景有速度线和分镜对比
composition: 宽封面 2.35:1，左侧展示旧代码死锁场景（红色警告），右侧展示新 RunAndCaptureText 一行代码（绿色成功），中间穿插速度线象征性能提升
style: japanese-manga, ink lines, speed lines, limited color palette, black and white with accent colors
color_palette: 墨线黑白主调，错误用红色，成功用绿色，速度线用金色
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration in japanese manga style, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Split-panel composition: left panel shows a developer frustrated by a deadlock (red warning signs, pipe buffer overflow symbols, code fragments in chaos), right panel shows the same developer triumphant holding a single line of code 'RunAndCaptureText()' with green success glow and dynamic speed lines. Background has manga speed lines radiating outward. Small Chinese labels: '旧方法' on left panel, '一行搞定' on right panel, '98x' as a bold accent number. Ink line art style with minimal colors - mostly black/white with red for error and green for success. No fake UI, no dashboard, no English slogans.
